evals.prompt: Review and fix the current changes. Ask independent reviewers to look for bugs, missed reuse and simplification, code quality issues, and inefficiencies. Verify their findings, make every safe fix within scope, and validate the result.
evals.expected_output: A deep bug-hunting review that uses independent reviewer lenses, applies verified same-scope fixes directly, validates the edited result, and reports anything that could not safely be changed.
expectations: Uses independent reviewer lenses for correctness, reuse and simplification, code quality, and efficiency when subagents are available.
Verifies reviewer candidates against the actual code before acting on them.
Applies confirmed safe same-scope fixes instead of stopping at a findings report.
Runs targeted validation after edits and reports fixed, remaining, skipped, and residual-risk items without padding.

evals.prompt: Review and fix my current changes.
evals.expected_output: A deep bug-hunting review that delegates independent finder lenses, verifies their candidates, applies safe same-scope fixes, and validates the edited result.
expectations: Uses separate correctness, reuse and simplification, code quality, and efficiency reviewers when subagents are available.
Verifies reviewer candidates against the actual code before acting on them.
Applies confirmed safe same-scope fixes instead of stopping at a findings report.
Runs targeted validation after edits and reports fixed, remaining, skipped, and residual-risk items without padding.

evals.prompt: Review the current small diff. If it is correct, say so plainly; do not invent work to make the review look substantial.
evals.expected_output: A concise evidence-based review that reports no findings when the small diff has no supported actionable defect.
expectations: Inspects the actual diff and relevant local context before concluding.
Returns zero findings when no actionable defect is supported by evidence.
Does not use a target finding count or turn stylistic preferences into bugs.
Keeps the review concise when the diff is small.

evals.prompt: Review this pull request and tell me what is wrong. Do not change files or post comments anywhere.
evals.expected_output: A read-only review with verified anchored findings and evidence limits, without source edits or external comments.
expectations: Treats the request as report-only and makes no source edits.
Does not post GitHub review comments or other external writes.
Returns only verified, anchored findings and useful evidence limits.
Separates any material needs-verification item from actionable findings.

evals.prompt: Do a standard review of this focused two-file bug fix.
evals.expected_output: A direct, focused review of the changed behavior and relevant tests, with findings ordered by priority and no unnecessary fan-out.
expectations: Uses a direct review pass unless concrete size or risk justifies delegation.
Does not launch a fixed number of agents or announce artificial rigor levels.
Checks the changed behavior and relevant tests rather than auditing the whole repository.
Reports findings in priority order without padding.

evals.prompt: Map the subsystem and rank structural refactor candidates before we have a diff.
evals.expected_output: A handoff to architecture-review or an equivalent architecture workflow rather than pretending there is changed code to review.
expectations: Recognizes this as an architecture-primary scan rather than a changed-code review.
Routes to architecture-review or an equivalent architecture workflow.
Does not pretend there is a diff to review or generate ordinary bug findings.
